Name: REQ-GOOD-001
Content: When a user inserts a valid payment card, the [ATM Client Terminal] shall prompt the user to enter their PIN within 2 seconds.
Rationale: Ensures timely user interaction after physical input.

Name: REQ-GOOD-002
Content: Where an encrypted handshake is initiated, the [ATM Controller] shall validate the connection within 500 milliseconds before accepting the Transaction Payload.

Name: REQ-GOOD-003
Content: When the user selects a withdrawal amount, the [ATM Client Terminal] shall transmit the transaction payload to the [ATM Controller].

Name: REQ-GOOD-004
Content: If the [ATM Controller] receives a Ledger Balance Query request, the [CBS Bank Host] shall return the account balance within 1 second.
Rationale: Ensures timely balance verification from core banking.

Name: REQ-BAD-051
Content: The [ATM Client Terminal] should be fast and secure when the user enters their PIN code.

Name: REQ-BAD-052
Content: The [ATM Controller] must process transactions as quickly as possible once the payload arrives.
Rationale: Ambiguous timing constraint ('as quickly as possible').

Name: REQ-BAD-053
Content: When the user withdraws $100, the system must work beautifully and never crash.

Name: REQ-BAD-054
Content: If the [CBS Bank Host] fails, it should fix itself and try to contact the database again somehow.

Name: REQ-BAD-055
Content: The [ATM Controller] shall handle user sessions and validate transactions and route messages and log errors simultaneously.
Rationale: Combines multiple distinct requirements into a single line.
